title: Chimney's Mushrooms
description: A mod that completely reworks mushrooms in Minecraft.
body:
Chimney's Mushrooms significantly overhauls mushrooms and mushroom cultivation. 

## Feature list
- 13 brand new mushroom types
- New cultivation gameplay loop (Grain bag -> spawn bag -> inoculated substrate -> harvestable clusters)
- Unique effects, including psychedelics, incontinence, and the fabled blue angel
- New structure and villager (Mycologist)
- Myceliated Wood Set
- Farmers Delight Compatibility

## Villager
To get the villager, you can use the POI block "Mushroom Drying Station"

## Cultivation Guide
1. Craft a `Bag`
2. Craft a `Grain Bag`
3. Inoculate using `Grain Bag` with mushroom block/cluster, or hold mushroom item in offhand while using `Grain Bag`
4. Wait until your new spawn bag is completely colonized.
5. Right-click the target substrate (dependent on mushroom)
6. Allow to colonize
7. To let your mushrooms spread, log blocks spread to other logs, dirt based substrate spreads to mulch, and turtle mulch based substrate spreads to other turtle mulch

## Blue Angel
The blue angel provides an alternative to the totem of undying. Eating it grants you 8 seconds (configurable) of strong damage and death negation, along with massive regeneration.
A good place to look for it is the end, however it is quite rare. Growing it requires dung of the turtle, as well as scoot, to make turtle mulch.

## Magical Mushroom
The magical mushroom gives you a significant xp boost for it's duration, however when in use, the game becomes much harder to play.

## Russula
This mushroom is what makes the potion of incontinence, which is required if you would like to make dung based, or turtle dung based substrate. 


## Wild spawn biomes by mushroom
| Mushroom         | Natural biomes                                                                   |
| ---------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Blue Angel       | End biomes (`#minecraft:is_end`)                                                 |
| Chanterelle      | Forests, Plains, Sunflower Plains, Meadow, Dark Forest, Mushroom Fields          |
| Death Cap        | Forests, Plains, Sunflower Plains, Meadow, Dark Forest, Mushroom Fields          |
| Fly Agaric       | Forests, Plains, Sunflower Plains, Meadow, Dark Forest, Mushroom Fields          |
| Freedom Cap      | Forests, Plains, Sunflower Plains, Meadow, Dark Forest, Mushroom Fields          |
| King Trumpet     | Forests, Plains, Sunflower Plains, Meadow, Dark Forest, Mushroom Fields          |
| Lion's Mane      | Forests, Jungles, Plains, Sunflower Plains, Meadow, Dark Forest, Mushroom Fields |
| Magical Mushroom | Forests, Plains, Sunflower Plains, Meadow, Dark Forest, Mushroom Fields          |
| Morel            | Forests, Plains, Sunflower Plains, Meadow, Dark Forest, Mushroom Fields          |
| Oyster           | Forests, Jungles, Plains, Sunflower Plains, Meadow, Dark Forest, Mushroom Fields |
| Portobello       | Forests, Plains, Sunflower Plains, Meadow, Dark Forest, Mushroom Fields          |
| Russula          | Forests, Plains, Sunflower Plains, Meadow, Dark Forest, Mushroom Fields          |
| Shiitake         | Forests, Jungles, Plains, Sunflower Plains, Meadow, Dark Forest, Mushroom Fields |
